description: Plan a 5-day meal prep that hits macronutrient targets (180g protein, 220g carbs, 60g fats). The spreadsheet must include automated ingredient lookups, portion scaling, and visual indicators for target compliance. Save the file to /home/ga/Documents/meal_prep_plan.xlsx.

natural_language.prompt: Create a meal plan for 5 weekdays that achieves daily macro targets of 180g protein, 220g carbs, and 60g fats using the provided meal database. Use formulas to calculate macros based on portion sizes and apply conditional formatting to show target achievement.
